name: Tom Perez
subject: Let's be real for a second, Derek
body:
During this past year, Democrats have come together to fight for our shared values. Now let's carry our momentum into 2018.
---
**Pitch in $3 before tonight's important FEC deadline to help Democrats compete and win in all 50 states.
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523c04/4067b0a/4967e2d98/7e5fc2c8/4122991775/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20171231_tp_nd&source=em_20171231_tp_nd&refcode=em_20171231_tp_nd")**
**
Let's be real about something for a second, Derek.

If we're going to take back Congress in 2018 and beat Donald Trump in 2020, the Democratic Party needs to be a vibrant, innovative, and yes, well-funded organization.

That's why tonight's end-of-year fundraising deadline is so critical. The hard truth is that if we don't hit our fundraising goal for 2017, we won't be in a position to win in 2018.

**Chip in $3 before tonight's critical deadline.**

[QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523c04/4067b0a/4967e2d98/7e5fc2c9/4122991775/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20171231_tp_nd&source=em_20171231_tp_nd&refcode=em_20171231_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523c04/4067b0a/4967e2d98/7e5fc2d6/4122991775/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20171231_tp_nd&source=em_20171231_tp_nd&refcode=em_20171231_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523c04/4067b0a/4967e2d98/7e5fc2d7/4122991775/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20171231_tp_nd&source=em_20171231_tp_nd&refcode=em_20171231_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523c04/4067b0a/4967e2d98/7e5fc2d4/4122991775/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20171231_tp_nd&source=em_20171231_tp_nd&refcode=em_20171231_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523c04/4067b0a/4967e2d98/7e5fc2d5/4122991775/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20171231_tp_nd&source=em_20171231_tp_nd&refcode=em_20171231_tp_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523c04/4067b0a/4967e2d98/7e5fc2d2/4122991775/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20171231_tp_nd&source=em_20171231_tp_nd&refcode=em_20171231_tp_nd")
We've got a strategy to win, and it's worked this year: We put boots on the ground, invested in local leaders and programs, and developed cutting-edge tools to reach out to voters. I have no doubt that if we use this strategy in every state, county, and ZIP code this coming year, we can take back our majority in the House and Senate.

But I'm going to be real again: This strategy ain't cheap. In order for our historic 50-state strategy to work, we need historic numbers of Democrats like you to come together to take ownership of this party.

**[Will you step up today and chip in $3 before midnight to keep electing Democrats?](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523c04/4067b0a/4967e2d98/7e5fc2d3/4122991775/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+Will+you+step+up+today+and+chip+in+3+bef&utm_campaign=em_20171231_tp_nd&source=em_20171231_tp_nd&refcode=em_20171231_tp_nd")**

We can't do this without you, Derek.

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523c04/4067b0a/4967e2d98/7e5fc2d0/4122991775/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20171231_tp_nd&source=em_20171231_tp_nd&refcode=em_20171231_tp_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523c04/4067b0a/4967e2d98/7e5fc2d1/4122991775/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171231_tp_nd&source=em_20171231_tp_nd&refcode=em_20171231_tp_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523c04/4067b0a/4967e2d98/7e5fc2de/4122991775/VEsHBA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171231_tp_nd&source=em_20171231_tp_nd&refcode=em_20171231_tp_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523c04/4067b0a/4967e2d98/7e5fc2df/4122991775/VEsHBw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171231_tp_nd&source=em_20171231_tp_nd&refcode=em_20171231_tp_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Staff update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek:

I'm ready for 2018. I'm ready to show the GOP they can't stop me, even with their millions of dollars that are sure to pour into Virginia. I'm ready to show every kid across the Commonwealth and country that you don't have to fight dirty to win big.

I've got my first campaign staffers hired and on the ground, and they're raring to go. I want to tell my staff that they can invest in new, innovative digital tools. I want to tell them they can grow their teams and hire more people. The thing is, everything they want to do takes major resources. And I rely on my best supporters like you to make sure we've got 'em.

**So how about it -- will you help? Our campaign is facing the last major FEC deadline of 2017 tonight. After that, it's all hands on deck, all systems go.[So by midnight, I really need all of my strongest supporters to pitch in whatever they can.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=hrSbAUXRGR3TZybDNlCxDY6WAw0bBKFr) Every single contribution makes a difference.**

I really appreciate you. I want you to know that. I've run quite a few elections so far in my career, and I get to go to work every day to fight for a whole lot of people, and I couldn't have done any of it without your support.

**Before we hit tonight 's deadline, I hope you'll consider chipping in: [https://timkaine.com/year-end-deadline](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=kV%2FTFo%2BCPwwgLwTS6ExbXI6WAw0bBKFr)**

Thank you so much -- and a very happy New Year to you and your loved ones!

Tim

| | [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=P%2BBL5dhlcl2p5uBAlgIwE0zHuKeElA%2BA)
---
| Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=0RB7Vd8NC3e6YYL5sqtPt46WAw0bBKFr).

subject: One down, seven to go

body:

name: Keith Ellison
subject: Tonight's deadline
body:
The only way we will win is if millions of people come together and mobilize in every community nationwide.
---
**Pitch in $3 before tonight's critical FEC deadline to help Democrats compete and win in all 50 states.
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523c23/4067b0a/4942d1a8b/7e5fbf11/3283691025/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20171231_ke_nd&source=em_20171231_ke_nd&refcode=em_20171231_ke_nd")**
**
I'll get right to the point, Derek.

**Much of what we're able to do together in 2018 will be determined by how much money we raised to support Democrats in 2017.**

**[If you're with us, this is a critical moment to show it: Make a contribution of $3 to support Democrats before tonight's final fundraising deadline of 2017.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523c23/4067b0a/4942d1a8b/7e5fbf1e/3283691025/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+If+youre+with+us+this+is+a+critical+mome&utm_campaign=em_20171231_ke_nd&source=em_20171231_ke_nd&refcode=em_20171231_ke_nd")**

We've won some elections this year that many people would have called impossible only a year ago. We're proving that any state is fair game -- and that has Republicans in Congress terrified.

Let's keep it that way, Derek. Let's continue rebuilding the Democratic Party to be the party that will fight -- and win -- in all 50 states.

We can't do it without your help. Our success depends on you and millions of other grassroots supporters across the country.

**Before midnight tonight, chip in $3 so that we can carry our energy into 2018 and bring our fight to all 50 states.**

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: I'm asking you to be a part of this, Derek
body:
We've got big plans for 2018. |
---
[](https://secure.onwardtogether.org/page/m/c0879ab/45580a18/48acae83/57a51d08/476943402/VEsH/ "https://www.onwardtogether.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=onward&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20171231_fr_nd&source=20171231_fr_nd")

| | Derek --

When Onward Together launched earlier this year, we were supporting five groups that encourage people to organize for progressive change and to run for office: Indivisible, Color of Change, Emerge America, Swing Left, and Run for Something.

Seven months and some incredible victories later, I'm even more proud and inspired to work alongside these organizations.

We've got big plans for 2018. You've been on this team for a long time -- **I 'm asking you to be a part of this extraordinary chapter by chipping in $25 before the year ends:** | | [**Donate now**](https://secure.onwardtogether.org/page/m/c0879ab/45580a18/48acae83/57a51d0b/476943402/VEsE/ "https://secure.onwardtogether.org/page/contribute/default?utm_medium=email&utm_source=onward&utm_content=2+-+Donate+now&utm_campaign=20171231_fr_nd&source=20171231_fr_nd")
---

We aren't stopping with five organizations, either. Across the country, new groups like these are cropping up, powered by activists of all ages, backgrounds, and experiences -- and we're working every day to find the most promising and support them.

There is so much to be done. [**Let 's do it together.**](https://secure.onwardtogether.org/page/m/c0879ab/45580a18/48acae83/57a51d0a/476943402/VEsF/ "https://secure.onwardtogether.org/page/contribute/default?utm_medium=email&utm_source=onward&utm_content=3+-+Letrsquos+do+it+together&utm_campaign=20171231_fr_nd&source=20171231_fr_nd")

Thank you,

Hillary

|

Friend,
**Time is running out.**

_Greg needs help from the Hoosier conservative grassroots to gather momentum as we close out 2017. We are so close to our donor goal and it’s critical to build momentum for the long campaign ahead._

**Please take a second to review our goal progress below:**
***GOAL UPDATE***
**Donors: 82**
**Goal: 100**

Hello,

We have less than a day until our end-of-year deadline and we need your help to finish strong!

**[Have you chipped in $5 yet?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3207/9e00690/40b0b3b6/2403cf63/215759344/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-eoy-2017?utm_campaign=em17_171231_EOY5_fnd_gq_ful__AE&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em17_171231_EOY5_fnd_gq_ful__AE&utm_content=2+-+Have+you+chipped+in++ask++yet")**

2017 has been a building year for Team Gillum. We haven't always had the most millionaire contributors, but we have something that's truly special: you.

Andrew is the only candidate in this race who isn't a millionaire and he doesn't have a famous last name -- he's worked hard to get where he is today. Knowing that hard-working people like yourself support him and chip in whatever you can afford, whenever you can, means more than a check with a lot of zeros ever could.

This campaign started as a people-powered movement, and it will end as one when we elect Andrew as Florida's next Governor in 2018. A new poll shows that we have the momentum in this race and we're tied or beating our GOP opponents.

**[But, right now, we need your help to meet our end-of-year deadline -- so chip in $5 now.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3207/9e00690/40b0b3b6/2403cf62/215759344/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-eoy-2017?utm_campaign=em17_171231_EOY5_fnd_gq_ful__AE&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em17_171231_EOY5_fnd_gq_ful__AE&utm_content=3+-+But+right+now+we+need+your+help+to+meet+")**

Thank you,

Akilah

Akilah Ensley
Finance Director
Andrew Gillum for Governor

name: Laura Chambers, Democrats.org
subject: We might come up short, Derek
body:
When we wake up tomorrow, it will be an election year.
---
**We're so close to hitting our 2017 fundraising goal. You can help us get there by chipping in $3 before tonight's critical FEC deadline:
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523c38/4067b0a/493059eb5/7e5f807a/1611657580/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20171231_lc_nd&source=em_20171231_lc_nd&refcode=em_20171231_lc_nd")**
**
Derek --

With just hours to go until our end-of-year FEC deadline, we are just short of hitting our goal -- but we're close enough that your contribution could be the one that helps us get there.

When we wake up tomorrow, it will be an election year. Let's give this one everything we've got, starting before tonight's deadline.

**[Before the clock strikes midnight tonight, donate $3 to help hit our goal and give Democrats the resources to fight in every state in 2018.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523c38/4067b0a/493059eb5/7e5f807b/1611657580/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Before+the+clock+strikes+midnight+tonigh&utm_campaign=em_20171231_lc_nd&source=em_20171231_lc_nd&refcode=em_20171231_lc_nd")**

You and I both know that what we raise as we head into 2018 will be crucial to mobilizing communities and defeating the GOP -- especially with the amount of money Republicans are raising from special interests and billionaires.

Democrats already have a winning strategy from states like Alabama and Virginia -- now we need the resources to take that strategy nationwide in 2018.

**If you can, chip in $3 before midnight tonight to help elect Democrats nationwide.**

name: Van Hollen HQ
subject: Midnight FEC Deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| There are only hours to go until 2018. The stakes for our country are higher than ever.

[**Donate here before the End-of-Year FEC deadline and help ensure Chris has the resources to help Democrats stop Trump 's agenda in 2018 >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b9e/70cdc2ba/46ef4916/390237f/2290981137/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvh-2018election?refcode=CVH_EM_FR_FULL_171231&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Donate+here+before+the+EndofYear+FEC+dea&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_FR_FULL_171231&source=CVH_EM_FR_FULL_171231")

\--- Original Message ---

> Late at night while most of the country was asleep, every Republican member of the Senate voted to ram through one of the most regressive pieces of legislation I've seen in my life.
>
> They passed a bill that will provide a massive windfall giveaway to President Trump and his billionaire buddies and increase our national debt by over a trillion dollars on the backs of millions of middle class Americans.
>
> [**It was an outrageous process to behold. I was angry then -- and I still am now. But my resolution is to make sure the American people are fully aware of the implications of this GOP tax scam. And to channel that outrage into action -- to win Democratic majorities in the Senate and House. **](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b9e/70cdc2ba/46ef4916/390237c/2290981137/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvh-2018election?refcode=CVH_EM_FR_FULL_171231&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+It+was+an+outrageous+process+to+behold+I&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_FR_FULL_171231&source=CVH_EM_FR_FULL_171231")
>
> Not only will the tax scam further increase income inequality in America, but the Congressional Republicans' single-minded focus on this corporate giveaway pushed aside all other priorities.
>
> We might have spent this fall working to address some of the many pressing needs in our country, including passing a long-term budget plan, providing funding for the Children's Health Insurance Program and community health centers and passing the DREAM Act. But instead, Congressional Republicans spent that time huddled behind closed-doors with an army of special interest lobbyists, crafting a corporate tax giveaway that is opposed by the overwhelming majority of this country.
>
> [**Please help me fight back. Donate now before our critical End-Of-Year FEC deadline >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b9e/70cdc2ba/46ef4916/390237d/2290981137/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvh-2018election?refcode=CVH_EM_FR_FULL_171231&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Please+help+me+fight+back+Donate+now+bef&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_FR_FULL_171231&source=CVH_EM_FR_FULL_171231")
>
> There is an old saying "don't get mad, get even." We can do both. In the new year we must channel our outrage into action to fight back. As we saw in Alabama, Virginia, and elections across the country--every vote counts. The next best step we can take is to make sure Democrats win back the Senate and House in 2018!
>
> Thank you for all that you do,
>
> Chris Van Hollen
>
> U.S. Senator
>
>
>
>
>
>

**It’s our END OF YEAR fundraising deadline, and as of this email, we are short by $18,500. **

As I’ve said before, these FEC deadlines are a tool of the Washington elite. It's how they choose winners and losers. The candidates with big donors who make the most money are deemed "worthy," while little guys like us -- who rely on grassroots donors -- are deemed less prepared for office.

But Friend, if our end-of-year numbers are big, the Washington establishment won't know what to do!

We’re $11,235 short of our goal, and every donation for the next 24 hours will be matched dollar for dollar, Leah is counting on you, Team Leah < \- - - Begin forwarded message - - - > Friend, we’re just 3 days away from the biggest test our campaign has faced. It's how they choose winners and losers. The candidates with big donors who make the most money are deemed "worthy," while little guys like us -- who rely on grassroots donors -- are deemed less prepared for office. But Friend, if our end-of-year numbers are big, the Washington establishment won't know what to do! Isn't that a message you want to send loud and clear? I know I do, which is why I’m going to make this a little easier. Every donation we get before the END-OF-YEAR deadline will be matched dollar for dollar. That means a gift of $50, is really $100. I’m running for YOU because I believe that Wisconsin deserves better than what we’ve been getting. We deserve the American dream promised to us. body:
Like all of you across the country, Our Revolution's staff has spent the last year hard at work
#
Friends,
Like all of you across the country, Our Revolution's staff has spent the last year hard at work. We have organized the grassroots and fought the Trump administration's attempts to repeal the Affordable Care Act, target Latino and Muslim immigrants, and leave the planet unprotected from the greed of the fossil fuel industry. But with the passage of their so-called tax reform bill this month, it's clear we need to organize now more than ever.
[**Help Our Revolution fight back against corporate control over our politics by making a $5 contribution before our FEC deadline at midnight tonight.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ade7/bed43eb/395529cc/75fe96ef/968150153/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-2018?refcode=em171231-full&noskip=true")
We know what it will take to win back public office in 2018 and return our government to serving the many, not the few. While the political establishment and Beltway insiders laughed off Trump's first steps towards the Republican nomination in the summer of 2015, people who came from communities that had been left out or left behind like many of us recognized him for the threat that he posed, and the divisions he sought to exploit.
Trump is the symptom, not the disease. For more than forty years, the corporate and political alliance of lobbyists, consultants, wealthy donors, and politicians have advanced an agenda that shoved wealth higher and higher up. Both parties have participated in and benefited from this arrangement, while tens of millions of ordinary Americans are left out. Our job is to expand the circle of opportunity beyond the privileged few.
[**Make a $5 contribution before our FEC deadline at midnight tonight, and help us fight back against the politics of greed with a progressive agenda to serve the many, not the few.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ade7/bed43eb/395529cc/75fe96ef/968150153/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-2018?refcode=em171231-full&noskip=true")
None of this would be possible without you. From all of us on staff, thank you for protecting and supporting one another through a crazy year. We have work to do in 2018.
In solidarity,
The Team at Our Revolution

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: A toast!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek, New Year's Eve is a time to celebrate the year that's ending and toast to new beginnings -- and you know I like a good celebration, so I won't keep either of us away from the party for too long. **[But real quick, can you help my friend Tim by chipping in before midnight?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=2ohoTZBLVsOzpBwsjtQUkdPGKXDz3U9E)**

Here's the deal: The FEC records all the campaign donations that come in before midnight on the last day of the year, and posts the numbers in January so folks can see how all the candidates are doing. If the numbers are strong, we can feel good. If not... it's not a great sign for the race ahead.

It's been tough enough with Donald Trump in the Oval Office -- we can't lose a key progressive ally in Congress like Tim Kaine. And we sure can't afford to lose this seat if we want to put Democrats back in a Senate majority. But the GOP and special interests sure are gonna try to make that happen -- they're gonna pour millions and millions of dollars into Tim's race to try to replace him with a buffoon like Corey Stewart. No thanks.

**So before you head off to your New Year's Eve celebrations, do me a favor and join me in supporting Tim's re-election campaign:**

**[https://timkaine.com/year-end-deadline](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=xfAUbIDIoCz9tehQKXwmTdSHLf0Xae6D)**

Cheers,

Terry

| | [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Fo2luPIpKvP6AG0cGzfQ7dPGKXDz3U9E)

| Paid for by Kaine for Virginia

body:
[ Legit ]LegitAction

Friend,

In just a few hours, 2017 comes to an end -- and so does your chance
to be the one to put us over the top of our end-of-year financial
goal.

Thanks to the contributions of incredible Legit supporters from across
the country, we’re only $775 away from the $15,000 we need to hit the
ground running for legitimacy in 2018. Will you step up before the
deadline?

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/4460?t=1002&akid=519%2E356062%2Eq_476l ]Contribute $3 now,
before the clock strikes midnight, and you could be the one to put us
over the top of our goal. We only need the last $775 to reach our
$15,000 goal.

This is your last chance in 2017 to support our work and make 2018 a
new year for democratic legitimacy. Will you step up before midnight
tonight?

Thank you for standing up for democratic legitimacy today,

Russ Feingold
LegitAction

I wanted to send one last message before tonight's midnight deadline, explain why this race is so important, and why you need to give now. **[After you read the message below, I hope you can chip in and make a contribution towards our people-powered campaign.](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff6f/767134fb/5cfcb2da/4338100b/1476453319/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-email?refcode=em171231")**
* With Republicans' in Washington relentless attacks on healthcare and the middle class, protecting families and their access to good jobs, healthcare, and education has never been more important.
* We're not taking a dime from developers in this race. This campaign is powered by people -- not special interests.
* Our race is right outside of Washington, D.C., in Trump's backyard. Together, we can make real change for our community and show the country what good, local, progressive government can look like.
* **And our deadline is just hours away, the only way to hit our goal is for everyone to pitch in.**

[**That 's why I'm asking you now: Will you rush a contribution of $5 or more towards our end-of-year deadline at midnight? We're just $3,984 away from hitting our goal.**](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff6f/767134fb/5cfcb2da/4338100b/1476453319/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-email?refcode=em171231")
Thank you again. We could not do this without you, friend.
Donna
**[Contribute](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff6f/767134fb/5cfcb2da/4338100b/1476453319/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-email?refcode=em171231")**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
Email is the best way to stay in contact with supporters like you, but if you wish to unsubscribe from all emails, please [click here.](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff6f/767134fb/5cfcb2da/43381008/1476453319/VEsD/ "http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/unsubscribe")

Authority: Donna for Prince George's, Glenn Ivey, Treasurer
P.O. Box 44343
Fort Washington, MD 20749
